subject: attracting_component_subgraphs
truth: Stop using attracting_component_subgraphs(); use component functions and construct subgraphs manually.

subject: connected_component_subgraphs
truth: Stop using connected_component_subgraphs(); use component functions and construct subgraphs manually.

subject: weakly_connected_component_subgraphs
truth: Stop using weakly_connected_component_subgraphs(); use component functions and construct subgraphs manually.

subject: strongly_connected_component_subgraphs
truth: Stop using strongly_connected_component_subgraphs(); use component functions and construct subgraphs manually.

subject: biconnected_component_subgraphs
truth: Stop using biconnected_component_subgraphs(); use component functions and construct subgraphs manually.

subject: G.nodes_with_selfloops
truth: Stop using G.nodes_with_selfloops(); use nx.nodes_with_selfloops(G) instead.

subject: G.number_of_selfloops
truth: Stop using G.number_of_selfloops(); use nx.number_of_selfloops(G) instead.

subject: G.selfloop_edges
truth: Stop using G.selfloop_edges(); use nx.selfloop_edges(G) instead.

subject: G.node
truth: Stop using G.node; use G.nodes instead.

subject: G.fresh_copy
truth: Stop using G.fresh_copy(); use G.__class__() instead.

subject: SubMultiGraph
truth: Stop using SubMultiGraph; use subgraph_view instead.

subject: SubMultiDiGraph
truth: Stop using SubMultiDiGraph; use subgraph_view instead.

subject: MultiGraphView
truth: Stop using MultiGraphView; use generic_graph_view instead.

subject: MultiDiGraphView
truth: Stop using MultiDiGraphView; use generic_graph_view instead.

subject: MultiReverseView
truth: Stop using MultiReverseView; use reverse_view instead.

subject: is_list_of_ints
truth: Stop using is_list_of_ints(); use is_bunch_of_ints() which now tests int(item)==item instead of isinstance(item, int), so floats with integer values are accepted.
quote: A utility function is_list_of_ints became is_bunch_of_ints and now tests int(item)==item instead of isinstance(_, int)

subject: weakly_connected_component_subgraphs
truth: Stop using weakly_connected_component_subgraphs; it has been removed.

subject: cb.iterable
truth: Stop using cb.iterable; replace it with np.iterable.

subject: is_list_of_ints
truth: Stop using is_list_of_ints; it has been renamed to make_list_of_ints.

subject: to_numpy_array convention
truth: to_numpy_array now explicitly uses i,j (row, column) convention; existing code relying on a different implicit ordering may silently produce transposed matrices.
quote: explicitly stated i.j convention in to_numpy_array

subject: GML export of non-32-bit numbers
truth: When exporting to GML, numbers that do not fit in 32 bits are now written as strings instead of numbers; code that reads GML output and expects numeric types may break.
quote: When exporting to GML, write non 32-bit numbers as strings. (#3540)

subject: transitive_closure with cycles
old: transitive_closure did not return self-loops when cycles present
new: transitive_closure now returns self-loops when cycles present
truth: transitive_closure now returns self-loops when cycles are present; existing code that did not expect self-loops may break.
quote: Fixes #3187  transitive_closure now returns self-loops when cycles present (#3613)

from_fact: transitive_closure did not return self-loops when cycles present
transitive_closure now returns self-loops when cycles present

subject: from_pandas_edgelist edgeattr handling
old: from_pandas_edgelist behavior when no columns match edgeattr request
new: from_pandas_edgelist now handles edgeattr when no columns match request
truth: from_pandas_edgelist now handles edgeattr when no columns match the request; existing code that relied on the old error or different fallback may break.
quote: Handle edgeattr in from_pandas_edgelist when no columns match request (#3634)

from_fact: from_pandas_edgelist behavior when no columns match edgeattr request
from_pandas_edgelist now handles edgeattr when no columns match request

subject: G.node attribute
truth: Stop using G.node; it has been removed. Use G.nodes instead.
quote: remove tests of deprecated views and fix use of deprecated G.node

old: deprecated signatures of add_path, add_star, add_cycle
truth: Stop using deprecated signatures of add_path, add_star, add_cycle; they have been removed.

old: GEXF did not check attr type before converting inf/nan
new: GEXF now checks attr type before converting inf/nan

old: write_graphml_lxml did not write mixed-type attributes correctly
new: write_graphml_lxml now writes mixed-type attributes correctly

write_graphml_lxml now writes mixed-type attributes correctly

truth: spring_layout bug with fixed nodes has been fixed; existing code that worked around the bug may now behave differently.
quote: Fix spring_layout bug with fixed nodes (#3415)

subject: betweenness centrality subset
truth: betweenness_centrality subset parameter bug has been fixed; existing code relying on the buggy behavior may produce different results.

truth: UnionFind set extraction bug has been fixed; existing code relying on the buggy behavior may break.

old: A* returned wrong solution in some cases
truth: A* algorithm bug that returned wrong solutions has been fixed; existing code relying on the buggy output may break.

subject: inverse_line_graph edge cases
truth: inverse_line_graph edge case bugs have been fixed; existing code relying on buggy behavior may break.

subject: lexicographical_topological_sort bug
truth: lexicographical_topological_sort bug has been fixed; existing code relying on buggy behavior may break.

subject: partial_duplication_graph operation order
truth: partial_duplication_graph operation order bug has been fixed; existing code relying on buggy behavior may produce different graphs.

subject: shell_layout with 1-node shells
old: shell_layout kept 1-node shells away from origin
new: shell_layout now keeps 1-node shells at origin
truth: shell_layout now keeps shells with 1 node at the origin instead of away from it; existing code relying on the old positioning may break.

shell_layout now keeps 1-node shells at origin

subject: label_propagation edge direction
truth: label_propagation edge direction bug has been fixed; existing code relying on buggy behavior may produce different community assignments.

subject: asyn_lpa_communities bug
truth: asyn_lpa_communities bug has been fixed; existing code relying on buggy behavior may produce different community results.

subject: to_directed function
truth: to_directed function bug has been fixed; existing code relying on buggy behavior may break.

subject: OutEdgeDataView cyclical references
truth: OutEdgeDataView cyclical references have been removed; existing code relying on those references may break.

subject: Watts-Strogatz generator k==n
old: Watts-Strogatz generator did not handle k==n
truth: Watts-Strogatz graph generator now handles k==n; existing code that worked around this may break.

old: random_degree_sequence_graph docstring test had no seed
new: random_degree_sequence_graph now uses seed in docstring test
truth: random_degree_sequence_graph now sets seed in docstring test; existing code relying on non-deterministic behavior may break.

subject: edge_color inconsistency
truth: edge_color parameter behavior has been fixed to be consistent with node_color; existing code relying on the old inconsistent behavior may break.

subject: draw_networkx_edges minimum source/target margin
old: draw_networkx_edges did not have minimum source/target margin
new: draw_networkx_edges now has minimum source and target margin
truth: draw_networkx_edges now has minimum source and target margin parameters; existing code may need to adjust margins.
quote: Add minimum source and target margin to draw_networkx_edges. (#3390)

from_fact: draw_networkx_edges did not have minimum source/target margin
draw_networkx_edges now has minimum source and target margin

subject: pagerank_scipy initialization
truth: pagerank_scipy now supports an initial vector parameter; existing code that passed positional arguments may break.

subject: topo_order parameter in topological_sort-dependent functions
old: functions relying on topological_sort did not accept topo_order
truth: Functions that rely on topological_sort now accept a topo_order parameter; existing code calling these functions with positional arguments may break.

subject: no multigraphs for betweenness
new: betweenness centrality no longer allows multigraphs
truth: Betweenness centrality functions now raise an error for multigraphs; existing code passing multigraphs will break.

subject: GEXF output problem
truth: GEXF output bug has been fixed; existing code relying on buggy output may break.

subject: GEXF label and id reading flexibility
old: GEXF reading was inflexible for label and id
new: GEXF reading now flexible for label and id
truth: GEXF reading now has added flexibility for reading label and id values; existing code relying on strict parsing may break.

gexf reading now flexible for label and id

subject: average_shortest_path_length with Floyd-Warshall
truth: average_shortest_path_length now supports a Floyd-Warshall method; existing code relying on the old algorithm may get different results.

subject: jit_graph reading json string or object
old: jit_graph only read json from file
new: jit_graph now reads json string or json object
truth: jit_graph now accepts json string or json object directly; existing code passing file paths may break.

old: adamic_adar_index did not warn about self-loops

subject: Python 3.5 support
truth: Stop using Python 3.5; NetworkX 2.5 requires Python 3.6, 3.7, or 3.8.

subject: Python 2 compatibility code
truth: Stop relying on Python 2 compatibility code; it has been removed.
quote: Removed code designed to work with Python 2.

subject: make_str(x)
truth: Stop using make_str(x); use str(x) instead.

subject: is_string_like(obj)
truth: Stop using is_string_like(obj); use isinstance(obj, str) instead.

subject: literal_stringizer
truth: Stop using literal_stringizer; it has been deprecated.

subject: literal_destringizer
truth: Stop using literal_destringizer; it has been deprecated.

subject: reversed context manager
truth: Stop using the reversed context manager; it has been deprecated.

subject: display_pygraphviz
truth: Stop using display_pygraphviz; it has been deprecated.

subject: chordal_graph_cliques return type
truth: chordal_graph_cliques no longer returns a set; it now returns a generator.

subject: betweenness_centrality_source
truth: Stop using betweenness_centrality_source; it has been deprecated.

subject: edge_betweenness
truth: Stop using edge_betweenness; it has been deprecated.

subject: _naive_greedy_modularity_communities
truth: Stop using _naive_greedy_modularity_communities (private); use naive_greedy_modularity_communities (public) instead.

subject: minimum_st_node_cut return value
truth: minimum_st_node_cut now always returns a set; code relying on a different return type will break.

subject: has_numpy argument from create_py_random_state
truth: Stop passing has_numpy to create_py_random_state; the argument has been removed.

subject: context_manager reversed
truth: Stop using context_manager reversed; use reversed_view instead.
quote: Deprecate context_manager reversed in favor of reversed_view (#3983)

subject: make_str
truth: Stop using make_str; it has been deprecated.

subject: is_string_like
truth: Stop using is_string_like; it has been deprecated.

subject: contracted_nodes copy flag
truth: contracted_nodes now has a copy flag; default behaviour may change so pass copy=True/False explicitly.

old: UnionFind union accurately tracks set sizes
new: UnionFind union does not accurately track set sizes
truth: UnionFind's union does not accurately track set sizes; code relying on size tracking may silently misbehave.

subject: K-truss definition
old: K-truss defined for edges being in k triangles
new: K-truss defined for edges being in (k-2) triangles

k-truss defined for edges being in (k-2) triangles

subject: all_shortest_paths zero-weight edges

quote: Correct handling of zero-weight edges in all_shortest_paths (#3783)

old: from_pandas_edgelist overwrites source and target columns
new: from_pandas_edgelist does not overwrite source and target columns

from_fact: from_pandas_edgelist overwrites source and target columns
from_pandas_edgelist does not overwrite source and target columns

old: relabel_nodes does not preserve edges in multigraphs
truth: relabel_nodes now preserves edges in multigraphs; existing code relying on edge loss during relabel will break.

old: minimum weight full matching requires completeness
new: minimum weight full matching does not require completeness
truth: minimum weight full matching no longer requires the graph to be complete; existing code relying on completeness check will break.

minimum weight full matching does not require completeness

subject: generate_gml with stringizer=None
truth: generate_gml with stringizer=None has been fixed; existing code relying on the old buggy behaviour will break.

subject: to_scipy_sparse_matrix bug
truth: to_scipy_sparse_matrix has been fixed; existing code relying on the old buggy behaviour will break.

subject: simrank_similarity with directed graph
old: simrank_similarity with directed graph input buggy
new: simrank_similarity with directed graph input fixed
truth: simrank_similarity with directed graph input has been fixed; existing code relying on the old buggy behaviour will break.
quote: Fix simrank_similarity with directed graph input (#3961)

simrank_similarity with directed graph input fixed

subject: draw_networkx kwds handling
truth: draw_networkx now handles kwds explicitly; existing code relying on implicit kwd handling may break.

subject: return empty generator instead of empty list
truth: Some functions now return an empty generator instead of an empty list; code iterating or checking type may break.
quote: return empty generator instead of empty list (#3967)

subject: numpy float type inference
truth: numpy float types are now correctly inferred; existing code relying on the old incorrect inference may break.

subject: from_graph6_bytes args/docs
truth: from_graph6_bytes arguments have been updated; existing code using old argument signatures may break.

subject: view_pygraphviz show kwarg
truth: view_pygraphviz now has a `show` kwarg; default behaviour may change so pass show=True/False explicitly.

subject: chordal_graph_cliques generator
truth: chordal_graph_cliques is being turned into a generator; code relying on list methods may break.
quote: Prepare for turning chordal_graph_cliques into a generator (#4162)

subject: NetworkXError when k < 2
truth: A NetworkXError is now raised when k < 2; existing code passing k < 2 without handling the error will break.

subject: selfloops_edges with remove_edges_from
truth: G.remove_edges_from(nx.selfloops_edges(G)) now works; existing code that worked around this may break.

subject: from_pandas_edgelist custom keys for multiedges
old: from_pandas_edgelist no custom keys for multiedges
new: from_pandas_edgelist allows custom keys for multiedges
truth: from_pandas_edgelist now allows custom keys for multiedges; existing code relying on default key behaviour may break.
quote: Allow custom keys for multiedges in from_pandas_edgelist (#4076)

from_fact: from_pandas_edgelist no custom keys for multiedges
from_pandas_edgelist allows custom keys for multiedges

subject: to/from_numpy_matrix removal
truth: to_numpy_matrix and from_numpy_matrix have been removed internally; stop using them.

subject: np.matrix removal from alg. conn. module
old: np.matrix used in algebraic connectivity module
new: np.matrix removed from algebraic connectivity module
truth: np.matrix has been removed from the algebraic connectivity module; code relying on matrix output may break.
quote: MAINT: rm np.matrix from alg. conn. module

from_fact: np.matrix used in algebraic connectivity module
np.matrix removed from algebraic connectivity module

subject: np.matrix removal from attribute_ac
truth: np.matrix has been removed from attribute_ac; code relying on matrix output may break.

subject: np.int_ typo fix
truth: np.int has been replaced with np.int_; code using np.int may break on newer NumPy.

subject: Python 3.6 support
truth: Stop using Python 3.6; NetworkX 2.6 requires Python 3.7, 3.8, or 3.9.

subject: decorator library dependency
truth: Stop relying on the 'decorator' library being available as a dependency of NetworkX; it has been removed.

subject: Jython/IronPython support code
truth: Stop using NetworkX on Jython or IronPython; support code has been removed.

subject: UnionFind.union
truth: UnionFind.union now selects the heaviest root as the new root instead of an arbitrary one.
quote: UnionFind.union selects the heaviest root as the new root

subject: pagerank default backend
truth: pagerank now uses scipy by default instead of the previous default.
quote: pagerank uses scipy by default now.

subject: simrank_similarity default backend
truth: simrank_similarity now uses numpy by default instead of the previous default.
quote: simrank_similarity uses numpy by default now.

subject: hits algorithm default backend
truth: hits now uses the scipy implementation by default instead of the previous implementation.
quote: pagerank uses scipy by default now.

subject: to_*_array/matrix functions
old: nodes in nodelist but not in G were silently ignored
new: nodes in nodelist but not in G now raise an exception
truth: When converting with to_*_array/matrix, nodes in nodelist that are not in G now raise an exception instead of being silently ignored; add them to G first with G.add_nodes_from(nodelist).
quote: In `to_*_array/matrix`, nodes in nodelist but not in G now raise an exception. Use G.add_nodes_from(nodelist) to add them to G before converting.

from_fact: nodes in nodelist but not in g were silently ignored
nodes in nodelist but not in g now raise an exception

subject: draw_networkx_edges for undirected graphs
new: always generates a list of matplotlib.patches.FancyArrowPatch for all graph types
truth: draw_networkx_edges now always returns FancyArrowPatch objects instead of LineCollection for undirected graphs, which may cause performance regression for large graphs.
quote: Internally `.nx_pylab.draw_networkx_edges` now always generates a list of `matplotlib.patches.FancyArrowPatch` rather than using a `matplotlib.collections.LineCollection` for un-directed graphs.

from_fact: always generates a list of matplotlib.patches.fancyarrowpatch for all graph types

subject: relabel_nodes with copy=False
old: raised KeyError for mapping keys not in graph when copy=False
new: ignores mapping keys not in graph
truth: relabel_nodes now silently ignores keys in mapping that are not nodes in the graph, instead of raising KeyError when copy=False.
quote: `relabel_nodes` used to raise a KeyError for a key in `mapping` that is not a node in the graph, but it only did this when `copy` was `False`. Now any keys in `mapping` which are not in the graph are ignored.

from_fact: raised keyerror for mapping keys not in graph when copy=false
ignores mapping keys not in graph

subject: performance and coverage functions
truth: Stop using performance() and coverage(); use partition_quality() instead, which computes both metrics simultaneously.
quote: which computes both metrics simultaneously and is more efficient.

subject: label_propagation_communities return type
old: returned a generator of community sets
new: returns a dict_values object of community sets
truth: label_propagation_communities now returns a dict_values object instead of a generator; wrap with iter() if you need a generator.
quote: `label_propagation_communities` returns a `dict_values` object of community sets of nodes instead of a generator of community sets.

from_fact: returned a generator of community sets
returns a dict_values object of community sets

subject: prefix_tree return value
old: returned (tree, root) tuple where root was a UUID string
new: returns just tree, with root always 0
truth: prefix_tree no longer returns a (tree, root) tuple; it now returns only tree, and the root node is always 0 instead of a UUID.
quote: `prefix_tree` used to return `tree, root` but root is now always 0 instead of a UUID generate string. So the function returns `tree`.

from_fact: returned (tree, root) tuple where root was a uuid string
returns just tree, with root always 0

subject: NIL variable in networkx.generators.trees
truth: The variable NIL has been removed from networkx.generators.trees; stop importing or referencing it.
quote: The variable `NIL` ="NIL" has been removed from `networkx.generators.trees`

subject: naive_greedy_modularity_communities return type
truth: naive_greedy_modularity_communities now returns a list of communities instead of a generator.
quote: The function `naive_greedy_modularity_communities` now returns a list of communities (like `greedy_modularity_communities`) instead of a generator of communities.

subject: numeric_mixing_matrix and degree_mixing_matrix output
old: included rows with all zero entries
new: no longer includes rows with all zero entries by default
truth: numeric_mixing_matrix and degree_mixing_matrix no longer include rows with all zero entries by default; use the mapping parameter to identify rows.
quote: Output of `numeric_mixing_matrix` and `degree_mixing_matrix` no longer includes rows with all entries zero by default. The functions now accept a parameter `mapping` keyed by value to row index to identify each row.

from_fact: included rows with all zero entries
no longer includes rows with all zero entries by default

subject: weisfeiler_lehman_graph_hash
truth: Hash values from weisfeiler_lehman_graph_hash have changed due to bug fixes; previously computed hashes are incompatible with version 2.7+ and will wrongly fail isomorphism comparisons.
quote: have changed in version 2.7 due to bug fixes.

subject: Python 3.7 support
truth: Stop using Python 3.7; NetworkX no longer supports it.

subject: numpy.matrix usage
truth: Stop using functions that return numpy.matrix; they now emit FutureWarning and will return numpy.ndarray in NetworkX 3.0.
quote: Removed all internal usage of the numpy.matrix class, and added a FutureWarning to all functions that return a numpy.matrix instance. The numpy.matrix class will be replaced with 2D numpy.ndarray instances in NetworkX 3.0.

subject: scipy.sparse matrix functions
truth: Stop using to_scipy_sparse_matrix and from_scipy_sparse_matrix; use to_scipy_sparse_array and from_scipy_sparse_array instead.
quote: New code should use to_scipy_sparse_array and from_scipy_sparse_array instead of their matrix counterparts.

subject: functions returning sparse matrices
truth: Functions that currently return sparse matrices now raise FutureWarning; they will return sparse arrays in NetworkX 3.0.
quote: many functions that currently return sparse matrices now raise a FutureWarning to indicate that they will return sparse arrays instead in NetworkX 3.0.

subject: to_numpy_recarray
truth: Stop using to_numpy_recarray; use to_numpy_array with structured dtypes instead.
quote: This also includes support for structured dtypes, which enables the creation of multi-attribute adjacency matrices and replaces the less generic to_numpy_recarray.

subject: rescale_layout_dict
truth: Stop expecting tuples from rescale_layout_dict; values are now numpy.ndarray objects.
quote: The values in the dictionary returned by `~networkx.drawing.layout.rescale_layout_dict` are now `numpy.ndarray` objects instead of tuples.

subject: make_small_graph / make_small_undirected_graph
truth: Stop using make_small_graph and make_small_undirected_graph from networkx.generators.small; they are deprecated.
quote: Removed functions (marked as deprecated in NetworkX 2.1):

subject: to_numpy_recarray
truth: Stop using to_numpy_recarray; use to_numpy_array with a structured dtype instead.

subject: info function
truth: Stop using networkx.info; it is deprecated as redundant.
quote: Removed functions (marked as deprecated in NetworkX 2.1):

subject: random_state decorator
truth: Stop using the `random_state` decorator; it is deprecated and will be removed.

subject: union name parameter
truth: Stop passing `name` to union; the `name` parameter is deprecated.

subject: hmn and lgc modules in node_classification
old: hmn and lgc modules from node_classification
truth: Stop importing `hmn` and `lgc` from `node_classification`; these modules are deprecated.
quote: Deprecate `hmn` and `lgc` modules from the `node_classification` package (#5166)

from_fact: hmn and lgc modules from node_classification

subject: google_matrix return type
truth: `google_matrix` will return a numpy array instead of a numpy matrix; a FutureWarning is emitted in the current version.
quote: Add FutureWarning about matrix->array output to `google_matrix` (#5219)

subject: scipy sparse matrix usage
old: scipy.sparse matrix (bsr_matrix, coo_matrix, csc_matrix, csr_matrix, dia_matrix, dok_matrix, lil_matrix)
truth: NetworkX now uses scipy.sparse array datastructures instead of scipy.sparse matrix; code relying on sparse matrix behavior may break.

from_fact: scipy.sparse matrix (bsr_matrix, coo_matrix, csc_matrix, csr_matrix, dia_matrix, dok_matrix, lil_matrix)

subject: scipy sparse matrix conversion functions
old: scipy sparse matrix conversion functions (to_scipy_sparse_matrix, from_scipy_sparse_matrix, etc.)
truth: Stop using the scipy sparse matrix conversion functions; they are deprecated.
quote: Deprecate scipy sparse matrix conversion functions (#5262)

from_fact: scipy sparse matrix conversion functions (to_scipy_sparse_matrix, from_scipy_sparse_matrix, etc.)

subject: attr_matrix return type
truth: `attr_matrix` will return a numpy array instead of a numpy matrix; a FutureWarning is emitted in the current version.
quote: Add FutureWarning to `attr_matrix` to notify users of return type change (#5300)

subject: make_small_graph and make_small_undirected_graph
truth: Stop using `make_small_graph` and `make_small_undirected_graph`; they are deprecated.

subject: to_numpy_recarray
truth: Stop using `to_numpy_recarray`; it is deprecated.

subject: info function
truth: Stop using the `info` function; it is deprecated.

subject: omega (Kleinberg's hubness) bounds
truth: `omega` (Kleinberg's hubness) is now kept within [-1, 1] bounds; values that previously exceeded this range are now clipped.

subject: rescale_layout and rescale_layout_dict return type
truth: `rescale_layout` and `rescale_layout_dict` now return consistent types; code relying on the previous inconsistent return types may break.
quote: Consistent return type in dictionary output of rescale_layout and rescale_layout_dict (#5091)

subject: sampling from dict_keys
truth: Sampling from dict_keys objects is deprecated; convert to list before sampling.
quote: sampling from dict_keys objects is deprecated. (#5337)

subject: average_neighbor_degree
old: For directed graphs, `average_neighbor_degree` summed degrees of outgoing neighbors only but divided by number of 'in', 'out', or 'in+out' neighbors (mismatched numerator/denominator)
new: Now correctly averages the degree of the specified neighbor population (source='in'/'out'/'in+out') consistently in both numerator and denominator
truth: `average_neighbor_degree` for directed graphs now correctly computes the average degree of the specified neighbor population instead of mixing outgoing degrees with incoming counts.
quote: Correction to the treatment of directed graphs for `average_neighbor_degree` which used to sum the degrees of outgoing neighbors only but then divide by the number of "in" or "out" or "in+out" neighbors. So it wasn't even an average. The correction makes it an average degree of whatever population of neighbors is specified by `source` = "in" or "out" or "in+out".

from_fact: for directed graphs, `average_neighbor_degree` summed degrees of outgoing neighbors only but divided by number of 'in', 'out', or 'in+out' neighbors (mismatched numerator/denominator)
now correctly averages the degree of the specified neighbor population (source='in'/'out'/'in+out') consistently in both numerator and denominator

subject: nx.info
truth: nx.info now returns a more concise string representation.

subject: shortest_path for weighted graphs
old: shortest_path uses a different algorithm for weighted graphs
truth: shortest_path now uses bidirectional_dijkstra for weighted graphs instead of the previous algorithm.

from_fact: shortest_path uses a different algorithm for weighted graphs

subject: prefix_tree algorithm
truth: prefix_tree now uses a non-recursive algorithm; the original recursive version is available as prefix_tree_recursive.

subject: tracemin_chol function
truth: Stop using tracemin_chol; use tracemin_lu instead.

subject: maximum_independent_set function
truth: maximum_independent_set has been moved to the clique module under approximation; update imports accordingly.

subject: attrs keyword argument in json_graph module
truth: Stop using the attrs keyword argument in json_graph functions; use explicit keyword arguments instead.
quote: Deprecate the ``attrs`` keyword argument in favor of explicit keyword

subject: normalized parameter in communicability_betweenness_centrality
truth: The normalized parameter has been removed from communicability_betweenness_centrality; stop passing it.
quote: The unused ``normalized`` parameter has been removed

subject: spring_layout fixed nodes handling
old: raised an error or behaved unexpectedly for fixed nodes not in graph
new: ignores fixed nodes not in the graph
truth: spring_layout now silently ignores 'fixed' nodes that are not in the graph instead of raising an error.
quote: The function ``spring_layout`` now ignores 'fixed' nodes not in the graph

from_fact: raised an error or behaved unexpectedly for fixed nodes not in graph
ignores fixed nodes not in the graph

truth: Stop using from_numpy_matrix; it is deprecated.

truth: Stop using networkx.utils.misc.is_iterator; use isinstance(obj, collections.abc.Iterator) instead.

subject: networkx.utils.misc.is_list_of_ints
truth: Stop using networkx.utils.misc.is_list_of_ints; it is deprecated and no longer used.
quote: Deprecate ``networkx.utils.misc.is_list_of_ints`` as it is no longer used.

subject: omega()
new: omega() algorithm closer to published algorithm
truth: Stop relying on the previous omega() value; the value changes slightly due to the algorithm being updated to match the published version.
quote: Make ``omega()`` closer to the published algorithm.

from_fact: omega() algorithm closer to published algorithm

subject: lattice_reference() niter parameter default
truth: Stop relying on the default niter=1 in lattice_reference(); the default is now 5, which changes the output.
quote: The ``niter`` parameter default changes from 1->5 in ``lattice_reference()``

subject: omega() niter parameter default
truth: Stop relying on the default niter=100 in omega(); the default is now 5, which changes the output.
quote: The ``niter`` parameter default changes from 1->5 in ``lattice_reference()``

subject: is_*_matching functions
old: silently ignored nodes not in G
new: raises exceptions for nodes not in G in any edge
truth: Stop passing edges with nodes not in the graph to is_*_matching functions; they now raise exceptions.
quote: The ``is_*_matching`` functions now raise exceptions for nodes not in G in

from_fact: silently ignored nodes not in g
raises exceptions for nodes not in g in any edge

subject: random_state
truth: Stop using the random_state alias; use np_random_state instead.
quote: Deprecate the ``random_state`` alias in favor of ``np_random_state``

subject: euclidean function
truth: Stop using networkx.utils.misc.euclidean; use math.dist instead.

subject: to_scipy_sparse_matrix / from_scipy_sparse_matrix
truth: Stop using to_scipy_sparse_matrix and from_scipy_sparse_matrix; use to_scipy_sparse_array and from_scipy_sparse_array instead.

subject: union name kwarg
truth: Stop passing the name keyword argument to union; it is deprecated and not used.
quote: Deprecate the ``name`` kwarg from ``union`` as it isn't used.

subject: hmn and lgc modules in node_classification
truth: Stop importing hmn and lgc from networkx.node_classification; they are deprecated.

subject: min_weight_matching parameter maxcardinality
old: `min_weight_matching` accepted `maxcardinality` parameter (could be set to False)
truth: The `maxcardinality` parameter of `min_weight_matching` is no longer functional; setting it to False is ignored because the only reasonable behavior is True.
quote: The function ``min_weight_matching`` no longer acts upon the parameter ``maxcardinality``

from_fact: `min_weight_matching` accepted `maxcardinality` parameter (could be set to false)

subject: greedy_modularity_communities parameter
truth: Stop using n_communities parameter in greedy_modularity_communities; use cutoff instead.

subject: extrema_bounding function
truth: Stop using extrema_bounding; use the related distance measures with usebounds=True instead.
quote: Deprecate ``extrema_bounding``. Use the related distance measures with ``usebounds=True`` instead.

subject: dict_to_numpy_array1 function
truth: Stop using dict_to_numpy_array1; use dict_to_numpy_array instead.
quote: Deprecate ``dict_to_numpy_array1`` and ``dict_to_numpy_array2`` in favor of ``dict_to_numpy_array``, which handles both.
